content.text:
Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /Users/ertugrulsahin/Codalio/demo-project-v4/booking-app/prd.md:
     1	# Product Requirement Document (PRD) - BookEase
     2	
     3	## 1. Overview
     4	**BookEase** is a hybrid booking platform built on the Rhino V4 Rails API framework. Service businesses (barbershops, clinics, etc.) manage their services, staff, and availability through an organization-scoped multi-tenant API, while customers browse active services and available time slots and create bookings through a single-tenant public route. The key architectural choice is a hybrid tenancy model: one route group for organization staff and one for public customers, ensuring strict data isolation and role-based visibility.
     5	
     6	## 2. Problem Statement
     7	Service businesses need to manage their offerings privately (drafts, inactive services) without exposing incomplete or unavailable options to customers. Customers need a clean, scoped view of only what is bookable. BookEase enforces role-based visibility at the API layer: draft and inactive services are invisible to customers, and every booking is scoped exclusively to its owner.
     8	
     9	## 3. Target Users & Roles
    10	
    11	| Role | Description |
    12	|------|-------------|
    13	| `owner` | Full access to everything including billing and user management |
    14	| `admin` | Operational admin. Full CRUD on all resources |
    15	| `staff` | Can manage availability and update booking status, cannot delete services |
    16	| `customer` | Can browse active services and time slots, create and manage own bookings |
    17	
    18	## 4. Tenancy Classification
    19	
    20	**Classification:** `hybrid`
    21	
    22	**Rationale:** Organizations are shared workspaces where multiple staff members manage the same services and availability (multi-tenant), while customers act exclusively on their own bookings and see only public catalog data (single-tenant).
    23	
    24	**Route groups:**
    25	- `/api/:organization/...` â€” multi-tenant organization route for staff management
    26	- `/api/customer/...` â€” single-tenant customer route scoped to current user
    27	
    28	**Middleware:** `ResolveOrganizationFromRoute` applies on the organization route group only.
    29	
    30	**Record scoping:**
    31	- `services`, `staff_members`, `time_slots` â€” scoped by `organization_id`
    32	- `bookings` â€” scoped by `organization_id` on staff route; scoped to `current_user` on customer route
    33	
    34	## 5. Key Features
    35	
    36	1. **Hybrid Tenancy** â€” Two co-existing Rhino route groups: multi-tenant for staff (`/api/:organization/`) and single-tenant for customers (`/api/customer/`)
    37	2. **Service Management** â€” Staff create and manage services with a `status` field (`active` / `draft` / `inactive`). Only active services are visible to customers.
    38	3. **Staff Members** â€” Organizations manage their staff roster. Staff members are org-scoped and not visible on the customer route.
    39	4. **Time Slot Management** â€” Staff create available time slots linked to a service and optionally a staff member. Slots have a `available` boolean. Only available slots are visible to customers.
    40	5. **Customer Booking** â€” Customers browse active services and available time slots, then create bookings referencing a time slot. A booking marks the slot as unavailable.
    41	6. **Booking Lifecycle** â€” Bookings progress through states (`pending â†’ confirmed â†’ completed â†’ cancelled`). Staff can update any booking status. Customers can only cancel their own `pending` bookings.
    42	7. **Cross-Tenant Isolation** â€” The organization route enforces `organization_id` scoping on all owned models. The customer route enforces `current_user` scoping on bookings. Neither side can access the other's private data.
    43	8. **Draft/Inactive Hiding** â€” A `ServiceScope` filters services to `status: active` on the customer route. A `TimeSlotScope` filters to `available: true` on the customer route. Staff see everything.
    44	
    45	## 6. Data Model
    46	
    47	> Validation placement note: presence requirements are enforced in policies; model validations are format/type only with `allow_nil: true` (Rhino V4 convention).
    48	
    49	### Model: `services`
    50	A bookable service offered by the organization (e.g. "Haircut", "Consultation").
    51	
    52	| Column | Type | Notes |
    53	|--------|------|-------|
    54	| `id` | integer | primary key |
    55	| `organization_id` | integer | FK to organizations, non-nullable |
    56	| `name` | string | non-nullable, max 255 chars |
    57	| `description` | text | nullable |
    58	| `duration_minutes` | integer | nullable |
    59	| `price` | decimal(10,2) | nullable |
    60	| `status` | string | default: `draft`, values: active/draft/inactive |
    61	| `created_at` | datetime | |
    62	| `updated_at` | datetime | |
    63	
    64	Relationships: `belongs_to :organization`, `has_many :time_slots`
    65	
    66	### Model: `staff_members`
    67	A staff member belonging to an organization.
    68	
    69	| Column | Type | Notes |
    70	|--------|------|-------|
    71	| `id` | integer | primary key |
    72	| `organization_id` | integer | FK to organizations, non-nullable |
    73	| `name` | string | non-nullable, max 255 chars |
    74	| `email` | string | nullable |
    75	| `role_title` | string | nullable |
    76	| `created_at` | datetime | |
    77	| `updated_at` | datetime | |
    78	
    79	Relationships: `belongs_to :organization`, `has_many :time_slots`
    80	
    81	### Model: `time_slots`
    82	An available time slot for a service, optionally assigned to a staff member.
    83	
    84	| Column | Type | Notes |
    85	|--------|------|-------|
    86	| `id` | integer | primary key |
    87	| `service_id` | integer | FK to services, non-nullable |
    88	| `staff_member_id` | integer | FK to staff_members, nullable |
    89	| `starts_at` | datetime | non-nullable |
    90	| `ends_at` | datetime | non-nullable |
    91	| `available` | boolean | default: true |
    92	| `created_at` | datetime | |
    93	| `updated_at` | datetime | |
    94	
    95	Relationships: `belongs_to :service`, `belongs_to :staff_member (optional)`, `has_one :booking`
    96	
    97	### Model: `bookings`
    98	A customer's booking for a time slot.
    99	
   100	| Column | Type | Notes |
   101	|--------|------|-------|
   102	| `id` | integer | primary key |
   103	| `organization_id` | integer | FK to organizations, non-nullable |
   104	| `user_id` | integer | FK to users, non-nullable |
   105	| `time_slot_id` | integer | FK to time_slots, non-nullable |
   106	| `status` | string | default: `pending`, values: pending/confirmed/completed/cancelled |
   107	| `notes` | text | nullable |
   108	| `created_at` | datetime | |
   109	| `updated_at` | datetime | |
   110	
   111	Relationships: `belongs_to :organization`, `belongs_to :user`, `belongs_to :time_slot`
   112	
   113	## 7. Permissions Matrix
   114	
   115	### Services
   116	| Role | index | show | create | update | destroy |
   117	|------|-------|------|--------|--------|---------|
   118	| admin | âś… all | âś… all fields | âś… | âś… all fields | âś… |
   119	| staff | âś… all | âś… all fields | âś… | âś… (no status) | âťŚ |
   120	| customer (customer route) | âś… active only | âś… public fields | âťŚ | âťŚ | âťŚ |
   121	
   122	### Staff Members
   123	| Role | index | show | create | update | destroy |
   124	|------|-------|------|--------|--------|---------|
   125	| admin | âś… | âś… | âś… | âś… | âś… |
   126	| staff | âś… | âś… | âťŚ | âťŚ | âťŚ |
   127	| customer | âťŚ not exposed | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” |
   128	
   129	### Time Slots
   130	| Role | index | show | create | update | destroy |
   131	|------|-------|------|--------|--------|---------|
   132	| admin | âś… all | âś… | âś… | âś… | âś… |
   133	| staff | âś… all | âś… | âś… | âś… | âťŚ |
   134	| customer (customer route) | âś… available only | âś… public fields | âťŚ | âťŚ | âťŚ |
   135	
   136	### Bookings
   137	| Role | index | show | create | update | destroy |
   138	|------|-------|------|--------|--------|---------|
   139	| admin | âś… all org bookings | âś… | âťŚ | âś… (status) | âś… |
   140	| staff | âś… all org bookings | âś… | âťŚ | âś… (status) | âťŚ |
   141	| customer (customer route) | âś… own only | âś… own only | âś… | âś… (cancel own pending) | âś… own |
   142	
   143	## 8. Auto-Scopes Required
   144	
   145	| Scope Class | Tenant Route | Customer Route |
   146	|-------------|-------------|----------------|
   147	| `Scopes::ServiceScope` | pass through (org filter by BelongsToOrganization) | filter to `status: active` from customer's org |
   148	| `Scopes::TimeSlotScope` | pass through | filter to `available: true` from customer's org (via service â†’ org chain) |
   149	| `Scopes::BookingScope` | pass through | filter to `user_id: current_user.id` |
   150	
   151	## 9. Test Requirements
   152	
   153	Tests must be exhaustive and cover:
   154	
   155	1. **Cross-tenant isolation** â€” org A staff cannot see, update, or delete org B's services, time slots, staff members, or bookings (404 not 403)
   156	2. **Cross-user isolation** â€” customer A cannot see, update, or delete customer B's bookings (404)
   157	3. **Draft/inactive hiding** â€” customers never see draft or inactive services; customers never see unavailable time slots
   158	4. **Active-only customer catalog** â€” customers see only active services and available slots from their org
   159	5. **Booking ownership** â€” customers can only cancel their own pending bookings
   160	6. **Staff write protection** â€” customers cannot create/update/delete services, staff members, or time slots
   161	7. **Index exclusion** â€” cross-org index returns 200 with empty or filtered list, never 404
   162	8. **Unauthenticated access** â€” all routes return 401 without a valid token
   163	
   164	## 10. Seed Data
   165	
   166	| Email | Password | Org | Role |
   167	|-------|----------|-----|------|
   168	| admin@clipmaster.com | password | ClipMaster | admin |
   169	| staff@clipmaster.com | password | ClipMaster | staff |
   170	| admin@healwell.com | password | HealWell Clinic | admin |
   171	| alice@customer.com | password | ClipMaster | customer |
   172	| bob@customer.com | password | ClipMaster | customer |
   173
